message:
Fix Anthropic cache_control exceeding 4-block limit

The adapter was marking every tool definition with cache_control, which
exceeds Anthropic's 4-block maximum when there are more than 2 tools
(system + N tools + message breakpoint). Fix by marking only the last
tool, which caches the entire tools prefix with a single block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
